summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Enhanced Expense Management features. All 13 backend tests passed. Fixed critical SelectItem empty value error in filters. All UI components working correctly.
passed_tests: BACKEND TESTS (13/13 passed):
- GET /expenses/categories - Returns preset categories list (17 categories)
- POST /expenses - Creates expense with all enhanced fields (category, payment_method, reference_number, notes)
- POST /expenses - Creates expense with GCash payment method
- PUT /expenses/{id} - Updates expense (category, description, notes, amount, payment_method, reference_number)
- GET /expenses - Filter by category works
- GET /expenses - Filter by payment_method works
- GET /expenses - Filter by date range (date_from, date_to) works
- GET /expenses - Search filter (description, reference, notes) works
- GET /customers - Returns customers for farm expense dropdown
- POST /expenses/farm - Creates farm expense with auto-generated invoice
- POST /expenses/farm - Validates customer_id is required (returns 400)
- GET /expenses - Farm expense shows linked_invoice_number in list
- DELETE /expenses/{id} - Removes expense
FRONTEND TESTS:
- Accounting page loads with data-testid='accounting-page'
- Expenses/Receivables/Payables tabs visible
- Summary cards show Total Expenses, Receivables, Payables
- Filters button toggles filter panel open/closed
- Filter panel has Category dropdown with preset categories
- Filter panel has Payment Method dropdown
- Filter panel has From Date and To Date inputs
- Filter panel has Search input with placeholder 'Description, ref...'
- Record Expense button opens expense dialog

- Expense dialog has Category dropdown with all preset categories (Utilities, Rent, Supplies, Transportation, Fuel/Gas, Employee Advance, Repairs & Maintenance, Marketing, Salaries & Wages, Communication, Insurance, Professional Fees, Taxes & Licenses, Office Supplies, Equipment, Miscellaneous)
- Expense dialog has Description, Notes, Amount, Payment Method, Reference # fields
- Expense dialog has Date picker
- Save/Cancel buttons work
- Edit button opens dialog with 'Edit Expense' title
- Edit dialog pre-fills form with existing expense data
- Edit dialog shows 'Update Expense' button
- Farm Expense button opens Farm Expense dialog
- Farm Expense dialog shows info banner about auto-creating invoice
- Farm Expense dialog has Service Description, Notes, Amount, Date fields
- Farm Expense dialog has Payment Method and Reference # fields
- Farm Expense dialog has 'Bill to Customer' dropdown
- Farm Expense dialog has Invoice Due Date and Payment Terms fields
- Farm Expense dialog has 'Create Expense & Invoice' button
- Expenses table shows columns: DATE, CATEGORY, DESCRIPTION, PAYMENT, REF #, AMOUNT, BY + Edit/Del buttons
- Payment method badges have color coding (Cash=emerald, Check=blue, Bank Transfer=purple, GCash=sky, Maya=green)
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: SelectItem components in filter panel had empty string value which caused runtime error. Changed to use '__all__' as value and convert to empty string in onChange handler.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/AccountingPage.js - Fixed SelectItem empty value error in filters (lines 286-303)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed expenses during backend testing which were deleted after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced expense management features fully tested. Key features: preset category dropdown (17 categories), payment method tracking (Cash/Check/Bank Transfer/GCash/Maya/Credit Card), reference number field, notes field, edit expense capability, filters (category/payment method/date range/search), and Farm Expense workflow that creates both expense and invoice for a customer. Test credentials: admin/admin123. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_expense_enhancements.py.
